architecture.checks_run: Form (SSOT + inward-pointing dependency), Armor (N/A — methodology change, no runtime infra), Proof (structural invariants pinned by 12 pytest assertions)

security.checks_run: SEC-04 secrets/credentials scan: clean. SEC-03 injection: N/A (no user input, no SQL, no eval). DAT-03 PII in logs: N/A (no logging). The slug examples (recording-mock-sendgrid, test-oauth-google) are naming-convention placeholders, not credentials.

quality.checks_run: CR-01 mechanical baseline clean. Dead-surface scan: all module-level constants used. Contract-drift: standard's adapter table verbatim from ADR-007. Test coverage proportionate (12 assertions, one per Contract invariant). CR-10 performance patterns: N/A (file read once, no loops, no I/O hot paths).

methodology.cr_02_parallel_dispatch: not used; single-reader pass. Diff exceeds 200-line carve-out threshold (543 lines) but is narrowly scoped to 2 files (1 Python test + 1 Markdown standard) with no JSX/runtime-code surface that would benefit from three concurrent lenses. Recorded as a deliberate deviation; CR-06 auto-downgrade applied: maximum verdict capped at 'Approve with fixes' would have applied IF findings were present — since findings are 0, PASS stands by independent path (no auto-downgrade triggers fired).
